TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_cinmman, title = cinmman, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/cinmman} }

S.FORM: cinmman tayal hiya ka maki sazing lahuy,te qutux ka "tmami",te sazing ka "zmkani".
cinmman tayal hiya ka maki sazing lahuy,te qutux ka "tmami",te sazing ka "zmkani".
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨinmman tajal ħija ka maki s~ɕaziŋ laħuj,te qutux ka "tmami",te s~ɕaziŋ ka "zmkani".
